creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 201025
update sysutils/vagrant to 2.2.3

Attached patch updates sysutils/vagrant to 2.2.3.
This requires rubygem-vagrant_cloud 2.0.2 (which I committed in ports r489968) and rubygem-net-ssh 5.1.0 (see bug #234859). With those fixes in my testing tree, vagrant builds just fine and "works for me".
